title: Scope cache by key and artifacts by path with expiry
description: Key caches on the lockfile, scope artifacts:paths to real outputs, and set expire_in so storage and staleness stay bounded.
body: Use when passing build state between jobs or speeding installs. Do not use a single static cache key (serves stale dependencies) and do not upload broad artifacts:paths with no expire_in (storage balloons, secrets may be captured). Actions: set cache:key to include the lockfile (files: or prefix+hash), list artifacts:paths to only the needed outputs, set expire_in, and use dependencies:/needs: to control which artifacts a job receives. Validation signals include the cache busting on lockfile change and artifacts containing only intended files with a set expiry. Risk boundary: artifacts that capture a secret file or .env are a leak; scope paths tightly and verify contents.
